text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Almost there... Justone more lap!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Nature... She seems to be<n>overexerting herself of
late.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Her last race must be bothering her.<n>Hmmm... In
that case...

text_block_list.name: Quiz Host
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio vs. Nice Nature! It's time<n>for a pop
quiz!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe, looks like we've got quite theaudience. Ooh, fantastic! This is goingto be exciting!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Uhhh, Ikuno? How come you're<n>giving us a
quiz?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You're only going to end up getting<n>hurt if you
keep pushing yourself so<n>hard.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: So I thought that perhaps if you wentup against Teio off the track, youmight finally brighten up.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Really now? Geez... You're letting<n>your
imagination run away with ya.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Let's get started already, Nature!<n>Better brace
yourself though! Or else<n>the Invincible Teio will
best you in this<n>quiz too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Teio, you seriously like this stuff?! I<n>swear,
you're game for just about<n>anything!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Fine! It's not like you twoare giving me much of a say in thisanyhow!

text_block_list.name: Quiz Host
text_block_list.text:
Okay, time for the first question. What<n>is the
name of the traditional<n>Japanese underwear that
covers the<n>waist to the ankles?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Momohiki!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Ding ding ding!

text_block_list.name: Quiz Host
text_block_list.text:
That's correct! Nice Nature takes the<n>lead!
Question number two...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Don't count your carrots before the<n>harvest! And
the next answer—that<n>type of ancient grave is
called a<n>Zenpokoenfun!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Ding ding ding! Ding ding ding!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wow, you're on a roll, Nature! I need<n>to catch up!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature aces the beginning of the<n>quiz. But
soon enough...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Ooh, I know that series! It's On OurFair Wings!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Ding ding ding!

text_block_list.name: Quiz Host
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio's on fire with a streak of<n>five
consecutive correct answers!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heh, how do you like that?! Nowthat's what you call a comeback!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What?! Seriously?! How'd she close<n>the gap so
fast?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
She's practically glowing with<n>confidence. Well,
that figures...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everything was perfect! I had the win<n>in the bag!
But that darn Teio just had<n>to...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Dang it, dang it, dang it! I can'tbelieve this!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, wake up Nature! If I give up now,<n>I'm just
going to end up frustrated<n>again!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
This isn't over yet! The answer is<n>sankin-kotai!
The Japanese pit viper!<n>A rakugo performer!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio versus Nice Nature—their<n>fierce
competition is neck and neck<n>up to the very last
question. But in the<n>end, the winner is...

text_block_list.name: Quiz Host
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! The winner, by just a<n>one-point
margin, is... Nice Nature!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I beat Teio. I... won!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, sooo close! This is sooo<n>frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...But you won't be so lucky next<n>time, Nature!
This isn't over!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What the?! Now she's acting like the<n>main
character on her redemption<n>arc?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Geez. Her optimism's unwavering.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. In any case, Nature, you<n>finally got your
win.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ikuno... Yeah, I did.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Still... I know I won today, but the<n>frustration's
still there.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So I'm not going to rest—not until I<n>beat Teio in a
race!
